nodes.label: Regression coverage: /api/gateway/status uses agent_health payload as the author
Parse the accumulated body as JSON.
Invoke handle_get for /api/gateway/status and return the parsed JSON.      monke
AC1: alive=true + empty identity_map → running=true, configured=true, platforms=
AC2: alive=false + empty identity_map → running=false, configured=true, platform
When alive=None (not configured): fall back to identity_map heuristic,     and s
AC3: alive=true + sessions with platforms → running=true, configured=true, platf
When alive=None (not configured) but sessions exist, running reflects identity_m
Edge: sessions.json is corrupted → identity_map empty, rely on agent_health alon
Edge: sessions exist but all have blank/missing platform fields → platforms=[],
When agent_health says alive=false, running should be false regardless of sessio
Edge: response always has 'running' and 'configured' fields.     Frontend handle
Bonus: alive=true + identity_map={} → last_active is empty string.     This guar
